content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule with a zoomed-in view on atom 20, I can identify the following neighbor atoms that are covalently bonded to C:20:

**Neighbor atoms of C:20:**
| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 16 | C |
| 19 | N |
| 21 | C |

**geomconf_index:** 3008

**Summary:**
- Atom 20 is a carbon (C:20) that is part of a heterocyclic ring structure
- It is covalently bonded to:
  - Atom 16 (another carbon, C:16) - part of the same ring
  - Atom 19 (a nitrogen, N:19) - also part of the same ring
  - Atom 21 (a carbon, C:21) - this carbon is attached to three hydrogens (H:22, H:23, H:24)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 20, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
